privileged_info_summary: The task requires creating a new company contact in Odoo 17 Community CRM with the following verified details: Company Name 'Meridian Financial Group', Email 'info@meridianfinancial.com', Phone '+1 (212) 555-0847' (using the 555 fictional exchange reserved for test data per RFC 3092), City 'New York', Country 'United States', and Contact Type 'Company' (not individual). All customer data is synthetic and freshly created during task execution—the setup script explicitly cleans up any existing partner with this name before recording initial state. The task operates in Odoo 17 Community with default admin credentials (admin/admin) in the odoodb database and uses the Contacts module (res.partner model) for creation.
